body:
## Rationale

Current gearPriceHistoryDrummers = ['lars-ulrich', 'joey-jordison', 'dave-lombardo'] (3 pages, live). #1808 (in ai-fix) adds Mike Portnoy, Gene Hoglan, Danny Carey (3 more). This proposal is the **3rd batch** adding 3 more high-value drummers distinct from both existing sets:

1. **Tomas Haake (Meshuggah)** — DEI era (1995: entry-level Tama, Sabian B8) vs Chaosphere era (1998) vs ÖBZen era (2008: Tama Starclassic + Meinl Byzance) vs present. 30-year career = rich gear evolution with clear price inflation data. Queries: 'tomas haake gear history', 'meshuggah drummer kit by year'

2. **Pete Sandoval (Morbid Angel)** — Pioneer blast beat drummer with documented gear shifts. Altars of Madness era (1989: Rogers/Pearl) vs Covenant era (1993: Tama) vs later era. Gear access limitations for touring extreme metal = unique inflation narrative. Queries: 'pete sandoval drum kit history', 'morbid angel drummer gear evolution'

3. **Vinnie Paul (Pantera)** — Cowboys from Hell (1990: Premier) vs Far Beyond Driven (1994: Pearl Custom) vs down era (2000: DW). Documented by Guitar World/Modern Drummer interviews. Queries: 'vinnie paul drum kit by album', 'pantera drummer gear history'

**Confirmed distinct from existing proposals:**
- #1782: lars/joey/lombardo only ✅
- #1808: portnoy/hoglan/carey only ✅
- This batch: haake/sandoval/paul — zero open proposals ✅

## Files to create/modify
### 1. `api/sitemap.js` — add 3 slugs to gearPriceHistoryDrummers array (lines 274–278)
```js
const gearPriceHistoryDrummers = [
  'lars-ulrich',
  'joey-jordison',
  'dave-lombardo',
  'mike-portnoy',   // from #1808
  'gene-hoglan',    // from #1808
  'danny-carey',    // from #1808
  'tomas-haake',    // this issue
  'pete-sandoval',  // this issue
  'vinnie-paul',    // this issue
];
```

### 2. `packages/frontend/data/gearPriceHistory.js` (or equivalent data module) — add 3 new drummer objects with era-by-era gear + inflation-adjusted pricing (follow Lars/Joey/Lombardo template)

### 3. SSR meta for 3 new /drummers/<slug>/gear-history routes — auto-handled by existing SSR handler if it reads gearPriceHistoryDrummers dynamically; else add 3 branches

### 4. `public/llms/gear-history/tomas-haake.md`, `pete-sandoval.md`, `vinnie-paul.md` — AI citation markdown

## Quality gate
- Each gear-history page ≥350 words with era breakdown
- Price data in consistent format (USD, era years, inflation % vs today)
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A per page
- Internal links to drummer profile + at least 1 related album article
- /llms/gear-history/ files follow Lars/Joey/Lombardo format

## Estimated organic uplift
- Targets 'what kit did X use in [decade]' AI citation queries
- Gear price history pages are unique differentiators — no competitor has inflation-adjusted data
- 3 additional pages × sitemap priority 0.9 = strong crawl frequency signal

## Verify
1. 3 new slugs in gearPriceHistoryDrummers array in sitemap.js
2. /drummers/tomas-haake/gear-history, /pete-sandoval/gear-history, /vinnie-paul/gear-history all render
3. Sitemap includes all 3 URLs at priority 0.9
4. 3 LLM files exist in /llms/gear-history/
5. Content includes inflation-adjusted pricing in at least 3 era columns

## Done
When all 3 gear-history pages render and LLM markdown files exist.
title: SEO batch: Gear price history expansion — Tomas Haake, Pete Sandoval, Vinnie Paul (~3 pages, 3rd batch)
